_comment: strict-lint — triggers on every save and error, enforces zero-warning policy.

onFileSave.prompt:
File saved: {{file}}

Call fixAllLintErrors on this file (auto-fix all safe issues), then getDiagnostics. Report any remaining errors or warnings — we enforce zero warnings.

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: All issues cleared in {{file}}. Confirm by calling getDiagnostics one more time to verify the workspace is clean.

onPostCompact.prompt: Context compacted. Re-orient: getGitStatus, getDiagnostics workspace-wide. Report branch, error count, warning count in ≤5 lines.
